description: You are a Cloud Systems Architect at a SaaS company migrating a monolithic web application to AWS. Create a formal AWS cloud architecture diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax for an Architecture Review Board submission. Design a production-grade, highly available 3-tier architecture (Presentation, Application, and Data) deployed across two Availability Zones. The diagram must include the VPC, subnets, Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway, route tables, load balancers, compute instances, managed database services, and object storage. Use AWS-specific icons and apply a professional theme. The document must contain two pages: Page 1 for the Primary Region architecture and Page 2 for a Disaster Recovery or Multi-Region failover architecture. Save the diagram to /home/ga/aws_cloud_architecture.eddx.
